    1. lock(LockMode)

Interface SelectBuilder.SelectLock

All Superinterfaces:
SelectBuilder.BuildSelect
All Known Subinterfaces:
SelectBuilder.SelectFromAndJoin, SelectBuilder.SelectFromAndJoinCondition, SelectBuilder.SelectFromAndOrderBy, SelectBuilder.SelectJoin, SelectBuilder.SelectOnCondition, SelectBuilder.SelectOrdered, SelectBuilder.SelectWhere, SelectBuilder.SelectWhereAndOr
Enclosing interface:
SelectBuilder
public static interface SelectBuilder.SelectLock extends SelectBuilder.BuildSelect
Lock methods.
Since:
1.1
Author:
Mark Paluch, Jens Schauder, Myeonghyeon Lee
